description: Mailshake is a sales engagement tool that automates personalized email and LinkedIn outreach, with AI email writing, lead scoring, and pipeline analytics.
overview: Mailshake runs personalized multichannel outreach across email and LinkedIn from one dashboard, with AI-assisted writing, lead scoring, and analytics aimed at pipeline.
what_is: Mailshake is an outreach platform that keeps email and LinkedIn campaigns in one place. Instead of juggling separate tools, reps and agencies coordinate sequences, personalize at scale, and track engagement from a single dashboard.

It is a good fit for running multichannel campaigns without a steep learning curve. Messages go out across email and LinkedIn together, and the analytics point at what is driving replies and pipeline rather than vanity metrics.

Mailshake connects with CRMs and data tools to fit the go-to-market stack. It centers on outreach automation rather than broad social-media marketing or deep analytics, which keeps the sales workflow straightforward.
